title: Battle of Goff (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Battle of Goff''' may refer to any one of three conflicts, all of which took place during the [[Airam (group)|Airam]] campaign of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]:
*An Imperial [[Attack on Goff|attack]] on ''[[Goff]]''
*A Rebel [[Attack on the Compellor|attack]] on the ''[[Compellor]]'' in the [[Goff system/Legends|Goff system]]
*A [[Ambush in the Goff system|Rebel ambush]] in the Goff system
{{Disambig}}

[[Category:Battles in the Goff system| ]]
